headings: UNCONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE ON PROGRESS PAYMENT
text: This  release  covers  a  progress  payment  for  all  labor,  services,  equipment,  or  materials  furnished  to  the property or to __________________ (person with whom signer contracted) as indicated in the attached statement(s) or  progress  payment  request(s),  except  for  unpaid  retention,  pending  modifications  and  changes,  or  other  items furnished.
